title: Mamit-ah Orientation programme on VB-Gram-G neih a ni
content:
1034/2026-2027

Dated : Mamit the 16th of June, 2026 :Vawiin khan District Level Orientation Programme on VB-GRAM-G chu DRDO Conference Hall Mamit-ah  Pu Suvigya S Chandra, District Bawrhsap & District Programme Co-Ordinator, Mamit hovin neih a ni.

District Bawrhsap Pu Suvigya S.Chandra, DC Mamit chuan Orientation Programme hlawk taka hman anih theih nan member lokalte duhsakna hlanin thahnemngai lehzual turin a sawm.

Pu Lalchhanhima, Project Director/DPO in inlawmna thusawiin, MGNREGA kumkhat a ni 100 inhlawhna chu VB-GRAM-G ah chuan ni 125 inhlawhna neih anih tawh turte, 1st July 2026 atanga he Act hi hman tan tur a nih thu sawi hawnna a nei a, kumkhat chhungin Ni 60 mipui inhlawhna chawlh lailawk (Agricultural Pause) - Mizoram ah 15th June 14th July leh 15th Dec 13th January neih anih tur thute a sawi.

He hunah hian Pu J.Lalremruata, MIS Nodal Officer in VB-GRAM-G Act 2025 chungchang sawi zauna a nei a, tin, Pu Remlalnghaka, Technical Assistant in Permissible works & Viksit Bharat Panchayat Plan (VGPP) siamdan leh Convergence Plan te sawina a nei bawk.

Vawiin Orientation programme ah hian Department hrang hrang te nen a Convergence kalpui dan tur zau taka sawihona neih a ni nghal bawk.

Attachment

title: Mamit-ah NABARD DDM Office hawn a ni.
content:
1033/2026-2027

Dated : Mamit the 16th of June, 2026 :Vawiin khan NABARD District Development Manager (DDM) Residence-cum-Office (RCO) Office, Mamit Venghlun a mi chu Pu Suvigya S. Chandra, IAS District Bawrhsap chuan a hawng.

District Bawrhsap chuan DDM ṭhuthmun Mamita awm ve thei ta chu lawmawm a tih thu leh Mamit District chhunga Bank leh loneitute'n hmasawnna an hmuhna hnar a nih tur thu a sawi.

Pu Bhaskar Manta, GM/OiC NABARD Mizoram Regional Office pawhin thusawiin NABARD hmalakna hrang hrang leh an hmachhawpte a tarlang bawk.

Vawiina DDM office hawn tak hi Mamit Venghlun chhungah awm niin MRB building chung berah a awm a,  B. Lalmuansangi, DDM leh staff thenkhat te'n an thutchilh rih dawn a ni.

Office hawn hun hi Pu J. Zoramsangkima, CEO, Angel Business Promoters of Mizoram chuan kaihruaiin Mamit khaw chhunga bank manager leh thawktu mai bakah SHG aṭangin mi ṭhahnem tak an tel bawk.

title: SERCHHIP DISTRICT ELECTION OFFICER PU PAUL L. KHUMA LEH ELECTION OFFICER PI LALCHHANHIMI TEN BLO-TE HNA THAWH ENPUIIN AN TLAWHCHHUAK
content:
1032/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 16thJune 2026:Vawiin khan Serchhip District Election Officer (DEO) Pu Paul L. Khuma leh Election Officer (EO) Pi Lalchhanhimi te chuan New Serchhip II leh New Serchhip IV bial chhunga Booth Level Officer (BLO) te chu an inah tlawhin an hna thawh dante an enpui.

Special Intensive Revision (SIR) 2026 chu Serchhip District chhungah ngawrh taka kalpui mek a ni a. Tun dinhmunah BLO te hian Enumeration Form-te portal-a thunluh (digitize) hna an thawk mek a. Hemi chhung hian an hna thawhnaah, harsatna leh buaina an tawh loh nante leh, a tul anga zirtir leh tanpui an ngaihnaa pui turin DEO leh EO te hian BLO te hi an tlawhchhuak a ni.

Pu Paul L. Khuma chuan BLO-te inpekna leh thahnemngaihna chu fakawm a tih thu sawiin, a tul hun apianga anmahni tanpui tura an awm reng thu a sawi a. Ram tana an inpekna leh thawhrimnaah lawmthu a sawi bawk a ni.

Vawiin June 16, 2026 tlai dar 6 thleng khan Serchhip District-ah Enumeration Form Digitization hi 97.79% zawh a ni tawh a ni.

Attachment

title: Dr. KC Lalmalsawmzauva, Adviser To Chief Minister chuan Ch.Saprawnga Truck Terminal aṭangin Organic Aieng ro Cheng Nuai 26.6 man hu a vailiam
content:
1031/2026-2027

Aizawl, 16th June,2026 :Vawiin khan Department of Agriculture & Farmers’ Welfare in Mission Organic Mizoram kaltlanga hma a lakna - Mission Organic Value Chain Development for North Eastern Region (MOVCD-NER) hnuaia Mizorama Farmer Producer Company din - Tlabung Turmeric Farmer Producer Company Ltd., Zodin, Tlabung te chuan an aieng tharchhuah cheng nuai 26.6 man hu an hralh a. Dr. KC Lalmalsawmzauva, Adviser To Chief Minister chuan Ch. Saprawnga Truck Terminal, Rangvamual, Aizawl aṭangin a vailiam.

He programme-ah hian Pu KC Lalmalsawmzauva chuan thusawiin Organic Aieng ro, Mission Organic Mizoram (MOM) te hmalakna chu lawmawm a ti a. Sawrkarin thlai thlan bik market an buaipuina kawnga thil pawimawh ber pakhat chu Chemical tel lo - Organic a nih thu sawiin, Mizoram chu Organic State a siam tumin hma lak mek a nih thu a sawi.

Khuallian chuan Khawvel changkang zelah mihringte kan duhtuiin, eitura damdawi leh chemical telh chu a hnawng chho zel a. India sawrkar pawhin hei hi ngaipawimawhin, chemical tel lo National Mission on Natural Farming atan cheng vaibelchhe 750/- lai buget-ah a dah thu sawiin, Mizoram-ah pawh khaw engemaw zatah kalpui turin Agriculture Department ten hma an la mek a ni, a ti.

Khuallian chuan India ram hmun dangte khaikhinin Mizoram chu chemical hman tlemna ram a ni a, hei hi advantage-ah lain state dang te aia market-a Mizoramin hming a chherna tur hun rangkachak a ni tih a sawi a. Tlaichingtute zingah Chemical lo hmang thin an awm a nih pawhin bansan a, Organic farming lama kal turin a sawm a; Khuallian chuan "Sawrkarin Organic thlai chauh Support Price a pek hun a la awm mai theia; chutih huna kan buai loh nan thlai chingtute chu chemical bansan turin ka sawm nghal che u a ni", a ti. Chemical tel lo lei tha Biofertilizers heng-Ran Ek, Bamboo leh Wood vinegar-te uar takin kalpui turin leh hemi lama project nei thate chuan rawn in report-a, Handholding a kalpui dan an ngaihtuah tur thu a sawi bawk.

MOVCDNER Phase IV hnuaia Tlabung Turmeric Farmer Producer Company Ltd., Lunglei District chuan aieng tharchhuah cheng nuai 26.6 man chu Assam lama buyer hnenah an thawnchhuak a. Tlabung FPC hian Dried Turmeric Finger, metric tonne 25 chu kg ah cheng ₹106.4/- zela hralhin, cheng nuai ₹26.6 zet an hmuchhuak a ni. Tlabung Turmeric FPC Ltd. hnuaiah hian organic aieng chingtu intelkhawm member 500 an awm mek.

MOVCD- NER hi State Lead Agency Mission Organic Mizoram, Department of Agriculture & Farmers’ Welfare te hmalakna niin, tun dinhmunah hian Phase III zawhfel tawh a ni a, Phase IV kalpui leh mek niin, tun thleng hian organic FPC 41 ziah luh tawh an ni a, heng FPC 41 hnuaiah hian organic farmer 27,604 ziahluh an lo ni tawh bawk.

Chemical tel inputs - rannung thahna hlo, hnim hlo leh chemical atanga siam leitha hman nasat lutuk avangte leh recommended dose aia tam hman thin a nih avang ten thlai tharchhuah te hi mihring ei tlak lova chhuah a hlauhawm hle a, heng venna tur leh thlai hrisel, mihring ei tlak ngei chauh tharchhuak turin Mission Organic Mizoram chuan hma a la mek a ni.

Vawiin Department of Agriculture & Farmers’ Welfare in Mission Organic Mizoram buatsaih programme hi Pi Vanramthangi, Director, Agriculture & Farmers Welfare Dept. & Mission Director, MOM chuan kaihruaiin, MOM State Coordinator Pi Baby Lalremkimi chuan technical report a pe a. He programme-ah hian Pi R. Lalramhluni, Jt. Director, Agriculture & Farmers Welfare Dept. te, Pu Lalengliana, Jt. Director, Agriculture & Farmers Welfare Dept.te,  Pu Lalhmingmuana, Managing Director, MAMB te, Pu Ngurrinsanga Sailo, Jt. Director, Agriculture & Farmers Welfare Dept. te, Pu Dr. David Fangzauva, Dy. Managing Director, MAMB leh MOVCDNER enkawltu MOM aṭangin State Coordinator Pi Baby Lalremkimi bakah MOM Staff te leh MOM hnuaia Tlabung Turmeric FPC Ltd. CEO Barnabas Hembrom leh Service Provider Yahsowati Bio Multi-tech Unit - II te an tel bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: Champhaiah Stop Diarrhoea campaign hawn a ni
content:
1030/2026-2027

Dated Champhai, 16th June 2026:Stop Diarrhoea Campaign 2026 chu vawiin khan Govt. Primary School I, Champhaiah Bawrhsap Pu Mohammad Aaquib chuan a hawng.

Bawrhsap chuan thu sawiin, kawthalo hian naupangte ah thihna hial a thlen ve theih avangin ngaihpawimawh a tul thu a sawi a, kawthalo laka kan invenna atana pawimawh hmasa ber chu kut silfai, a ti a, chaw ei hma leh chaw ei zawh bakah inthiar zawhah fai taka kut sil thin tur a nih thu a sawi a, Health Department a thawkte tih turah chauh dah tur a ni lova, nu leh pa te bakah zirtirtute pawhin mawhphurhna an nei tih a sawi a, kan in leh a bul vel tihvai te, tui thianghlim chauh in tur leh kua a tha lo a nih chuan inentir nachang hriat leh ORS leh Zinc ei/in nachang hriat a pawimawh thu a sawi a.

Champhai District atanga kawthalo natna umbo a nih theih nan leh kawthalo vanga thihna a thlen tawh loh na turin Stop Diarrhoea Campaign hi a hawng a ni.

He hun hi Dr. Walter Lalnuntluanga Sailo, CMO chuan kaihruaiin khawtha lo avanga dam lo tam tak an awm tih sawiin thihna thlen phuk phuk lo mahse kawtha lo avang hian chhungkaw tam tak in harsatna an tawh thu leh kawthalo hi amaha lo awm tawp ni lovin kan thil tih danin a zir leh zir lohah a innghah thu a sawi a, kawthalo laka invenna leh inenkawl dante a tarlang.

Dr. Lalramhluna, Dy. CMO chuan Stop Diarrhoea Campaign 2026 chungchang a sawi zau a, Champhai District ah nikum chhung khan naupang 813 khawthalo avangin an dam lova, an zinga 2 te chuan nunna an chan tih a tarlang a, kawthalo hi tihdam theih leh ven theih niin kan nunna atana hlauhawm ber chu taksa ah dehydration a thlen theih vang tih a tarlang.

Kawthalo laka inven nan rhil pathum ORS, Zinc leh kutsilfai a pawimawh thu a sawi a, kua a that loh velah ORS in nghal vat thin tur tih tarlangin ORS bakah zinc ei dan tur leh fai taka kut sil a pawimawhna a tarlang tel bawk.

ORS, Zinc leh fai taka kut sil hian kawthalo lakah min ven theih avangin chhungkaw tinin ngaihpawimawh a tul tih a sawi a, ORS leh Zinc te hi kawl reng a tul thu sawiin, hetianga chhungkaw tinin kan tih chuan kan khua atangin kawthalo hri kan umbo thei dawn, a ti.

Health Worker, ASHA leh Anganwadi worker te chuan fai taka kut sil dan an zirtir a ni.

Stop Diarrhoea Campaign ah hian Kawthalo ven nan faina leh ORS a pawimawh tih chu thupui atan hman a ni a, vawiin atangin Campaign hi kawng hrang hrangin kalpui nghal a ni dawn a, thla khat chhung a awh dawn a ni

title: Lungleiah Pu Mapuia Chongthu hnenah Janjatiya Garima Utsav pualin "Tribal Unsung Heroes Award" hlan a ni
content:
1029/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Nikir thla ni 16:Vawiin khan District Art & Culture Auditorium, Lungleiah hnam tana a hna thawh ṭhat avangin Pu Mapuia Chongthu, Lunglei hnenah Janjatiya Garima Utsav Award, "Tribal Unsung Heroes Award" hlan a ni.

Mizoram sawrkara Art & Culture (A&C) Department hnuaia Tribal Research Institute huaihawta Award hlanna hun buatsaih hi Lunglei District Art & Culture Office-a Senior Research Officer Pu Lalmuanpuia chuan kaihruaiin, Award awmzia leh Pu Mapuia Chongthu hnena Award hlan chhan a sawi fiah a. Award hi Ministry of Tribal Affairs ai awhin Pu Mapuia Chongthu kutah a hlan nghal bawk.

He Award hi India sawrkar Ministry of Tribal Affairs buatsaih Janjatiya Garima Utsav (Tribal Pride Festival) 2026 puala hlan a ni a. He Kut hun chhung hian ram chhung hmun hrang hrangah programme hrang hrang buatsaih niin, hnam tlem zawkte zinga mahni hnam leh ram tana hna thawk ṭhate chawimawi an ni.

Pu Mapuia Chongthu pawh hi lemchan (film) siam lama a hna thawh ropui tak avangin he chawimawina hi hlan a ni a. He Award hian Trophy/Memento leh pawisa fai ₹10,000/- a keng tel.

Attachment

title: Lunglei Police te'n lirthei ke hnih nei meikhu chhuahna ri bengchheng tura chei danglam an mante dan angin an tichhia
content:
1028/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Nikir thla ni 16:Lunglei District Superintendent of Police (SP) Pu J. Lalmuankima hma laknaa Traffic Police te'n Lunglei khawpui chhunga two wheeler (lirthei ke hnih nei) silencer/exhaust (meikhu chhuahna) 80 decibel pel leh ri ring tura siam danglam an man khawm chu vawiin khan dan ang thlapin Chief Judicial Magistrate, Lunglei District, Lunglei hriatpuinain Lunglei Pukpui Ṭawngṭaina Hmunah tihchhiat a ni.

Tlabung Sub-Divisional Police Officer (SDPO) Pu Alex Hmingthanmawia kaihhruaina hnuaiah silencer man khaem sate hi tihchhiat a ni a. Tun thleng hian Lunglei Traffic Police te'n two wheeler silencer/exhaust ri bengchheng an man khawm hi dan ang thlapin ṭum li tihchhiat a ni tawh.

Lunglei SP Pu J. Lalmuankima chuan ṭhalai ṭhenkhatin an two wheeler-ah danin a phal baka silencer/exhaust ri bengchheng an hman ṭhin avangin zan reiah mipui an timuhil thei lo va, mihring hriselna thlengin a nghawng theih thu a sawi a. Traffic Police te'n chak zawka hma an lak chhunzawm zel tur thu a sawi.

Tun ṭuma two wheeler silencer/exhaust tihchhiatte hi a vaiin kilogram 45-a rit a ni a. Kilogram 1-ah ₹10 hisapin thirchhia anga hralh niin, a hralhna aṭang hian ₹450 hmuh chhuah a ni a. A hralhna sum hi sawrkar revenue-ah chhun luh tur a ni.

Attachment

title: Lunglei West bialtu MLA Pu T. Lalhlimpuia'n MUP Venghlun Unit Lunglei Golden Jubilee lawmna a hmanpui
content:
1027/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Nikir thla ni 16:Vawiin khan Lunglei West bialtu MLA Pu T. Lalhlimpuia chuan Mizo Upa Pawl (MUP) Venghlun Unit (Lunglei) Golden Jubilee lawmna chu Khuallian niin a hmanpui.

Venghlun Indoor Stadium-a Jubilee lawmna hun hmanah Khuallian Pu T. Lalhlimpuia chuan MUP Venghlun Unit-in kum 50 tlinga Golden Jubilee an lawm thei chu a lawmpui thu sawiin, hruaitu hmasate leh tuna hruaitu leh member ni mekte zahna chibai a buk a. MUP Venghlun chu kum 50 chhung zet khawtlang tana eng leh lungphum pawimawh tak, inkaihhruaina dik leh nunphung mawi zirtirtu an lo ni tawh tih sawiin, ṭhalaite'n an hnen aṭangin zir tur leh entawn tur tam tak an neih thu a sawi a. Khawtlanga mi hlawhtling tak tak chher chhuaktu pawh upate an nih thu sawiin, khawtlang leh hnam nuna upate thurawn leh an hlutna chu eng tikah mah ngaihnep theih a nih loh thu a sawi.

Pu T. Lalhlimpuia chuan a bial chhungah inkal pawhna kawngpui ṭha leh zirna lama hmasawnna a awm theihna tur te, damlo buaipui leh kan chungchangah leh hmasawnna ruhrel hrang hrang din turin theih tawp a chhuah thu sawiin, thil tam tak tih theih ni lo mah se, dik taka tih chu a thupui a nih thu a sawi a. Upate chu khawtlang leh ram tan ke pen zel tur leh tun lai thiamna mila inzir belh zel tura chahin, kawng tinrengah hma sawn zel tur leh khawtlang tana malsawmna ni zel turin duhsakna a hlan.

MUP Venghlun Unit Golden Jubilee lawmna hi President Pu PC Ramnela'n a kaihruai a. Unit member chatuan ram pan tawhte sunna hun hman niin, Rev. P. Lalthanga, Executive Committee Member chuan hunserh a hmang a. Secretary leh Treasurer report ngaihthlak niin, Souvenir tlangzarh a ni a. Lunglei Municipal Council (LMC) Ward No. IV Councillor Pu R. Lalramzauva bakah, MUP Headquarters, Venghlun Local Council, YMA Venghlun Branch leh MHIP Venghlun Branch ai awhte aṭangin thu sawi ngaihthlak a ni a. Hruaitu lo ni tawhte leh member kum 90 chung lamte chawimawina hun hman niin, Pu R. Romuana'n lawm thu a sawi a. Pu CH Lawmthanga (ECM) chuan ṭawngṭaiin hun a khar.

MUP Venghlun Unit hian Section-I huam chhung Venghlun Waiting Shed bulah Golden Jubilee hriat rengna lung an phun a. Golden Jubilee Lungphun hi Vice President Rev. C. Zohmingliana kaihhruaiin a hawnna hun buatsaih niin, Pi Chalkungi (kum 96) chuan a hawng a. Golden Jubilee dar vuak ni bawkin, tlai lamah Golden Jubilee lawmna chawhlui kil ho a ni bawk.

Mizo Upa Pawl Venghlun Unit hi June ni 16, 1976 khan din a ni a. Tunah hian member 187 an awm mek.

Attachment

title: SOCIETY HRIATTIRNA
content:
1026/2026-2027

Aizawl the 16th June, 2026:Mizoram State Cooperative Union (MSCU) chuan Annual General Assembly Vawi 37-na chu Ni 18.06.2026 (Ningani) chawhma dar 11:00 hian Vanapa Hall, Tuikual South, Aizawlah a hmang dawn a. Affiliated Cooperative Society, kohna hmu zawng zawngte chuan member pahnih (2) intirh tur a ni e. Registration hi dar 9:30 – 10:45 A.M a ni ang.

title: SERCHHIP-AH ‘WORLD BLOOD DONOR DAY-2026’ PUALIN THISEN PETUTE CHAWIMAWINA HUN HMAN A NI
content:
1025/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 16thJune 2026:Vawiin khan Mizoram State AIDS Control Society (MSACS); District Hospital Serchhip Blood Centre leh Association for Voluntary Blood Donation (AVBD) Serchhip Branch huaihawtin, ‘World Blood Donor Day-2026’ puala thisen petute chawimawina hun, Serchhip Sub-Hqrs. YMA Hall-ah buatsaih a ni a. Serchhip District Information & Public Relations Officer  Pu R. Vanneihtluanga’n khuallian niin hun a hmanpui.

He hun hmanpuitu Serchhip DIPRO Pu R. Vanneihtluanga chuan thisen pek chu midangte nunna chhanna pawimawh tak a nih thu sawiin, “Thisen kan pek hian mi tam tak nunna kan pawhsei sakin kan chhan a ni mai lo va, thisen mamawhtu, retheihna avang te, natna khirh tak avangtea indawm kun mekte chuan, hetianga a thlawna thisen kan pek thinte avang hian thlamuanna hlu tak an lo neih phah thin a ni” tiin thisen pek ngai pawimawha, mi dangte tana malsawmna nih tum zel turin he huna kalkhawmte chu a chah a. Thisen petute chawimawina hun buatsaih a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi bawk.

He hunah hian District Hospital Serchhip Blood Centre-a Blood Bank Officer Dr. Lalruatliana Pachuau leh Association for Voluntary Blood Donation (AVBD) Serchhip Branch-a President, Pu Zonunsanga Kawlni te pawhin thu an sawi bakah Serchhip Blood Centre atangin Pu Lalhruaitluanga chuan Report a pe bawk a. April 1, 2025 leh March 31, 2026 inkara District Hospital Serchhip Blood Centre-a tlawmngaia thisen petu pawl hrang hrang 29 te hnenah lawmthu sawina leh chawimawina thilpek hlan a ni bawk.

April 1, 2025 atanga March 31, 2026 chhung khan District Hospital Serchhip Blood Centre-ah hian thisen Unit 690 pek niin heng zinga Unit 590 chu Voluntary Donation a ni a, hemi hun chhung hian Blood Donation Camp tum 31 huaihawt niin pawl pahnih te chuan tum hnih an pe hman a. Hemi hun chhung vek hian thisen Unit 560 pekchhuah a ni.

Vawiin hun hi AVBD Serchhip Branch-a Vice President Pu Ramdinthara Kawlni chuan kaihruaiin AVBD Serchhip Branch-a Secretary, Pu T. Biakchamliana kaihhruaiin he huna tel te hian World Blood Donor Day puala thutiam chu an chham rual bawk a ni.

‘World Blood Donor Day’ hi kum 2004 atang khan kumtin June 14-ah hman thin niin kumin hian Pathianni-ah a tlak avangin Serchhip-ah chuan vawiin June 16 khan hman a ni.

Attachment

title: FCS&CA MINISTER PU B. LALCHHANZOVA’N ZUCHHIP KHAW HMUN HLUI LUNGPHUN A HAWNG
content:
1024/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 16th June, 2026:Vawiin khan Food, Civil Supplies & Consumer Affairs (FCS&CA) Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova’n Zuchhip khaw hmun hlui lungphun hawngin, a hawnna inkhawm chu khuallian niin a hmanpui a, Aizawl Municipal Corporation Executive Corporator Pi Christina Roluahpuii Sailo chu khualzahawm a ni.Khuallian Pu B. Lalchhanzova chuan lungphun hawnna inkhawmah hian Zuchhip khawchhuak thlah a nih thu tarlangin, Zuchhip khawchhuak thlah kal zelten Zuchhip khua hre reng chunga an pi leh pute lu nghahna hmun an cheibawla roh taka an enkawl chu ropui a tih thu a sawi a. Mahni pi leh pute khawchhuahna hmun hi zahpui lova kan hriatreng hi a pawimawhin, malsawmna dawnna a ni a ti a. Hemi hmunah ruihhlo ngaite enkawlna tur Chhanchhuahna Home din a ni chu tha a tih thu sawiin, an inenkawl dan leh Home-a awmte pawh intodelha mahni ei tur an thawkchhuak thei chu chhinchhiahtlak a tih thu a sawi bawk a. Zuchhip Hmun Hlui Humhalhtu Pawl hmalakna chu fakawm tlak a tih thu sawiin, an kal zelna turah duhsakna a hlan a ni.Khualzahawm Pi Christina Roluahpuii Sailo pawhin kalkhawmte hnenah Zuchhip khawchhuak AMC Corporator an neih thu sawiin, Zuchhip khaw mipuiten Aizawl-ah Zuchhip khawchhuak thlenna an nei a ni tih hriaa, harsatna an neihte pawh a hnena thlen hreh lova, a theih ang anga a lo puih tur thu a sawi bawk.Zuchhip Hmun Hlui Humhalhtu Pawl hi 2019-a din a ni a. An hmalaknain Zuchhip hmun hlui huam chhunga lungdawh leh thlan awmte humhalh a ni a, ruihhlo ngaite enkawlna tur Chhanchhuahna Home chu 2020 khan din a ni bawk. PHE Dept, Zuchhip VC leh Khawzawl BDO-te puihnain tui dahkhawlna tur water tanky an nei a. P&E Dept puihnain transformer tha tak an nei bawk a. Chhanchhuahna Home-ah hian khum 34 awmin, tunah hian mi 32 an awm mek a, rawngbawltu 10 an awm a ni.

Attachment

title: MAMIT-A ZIRLAI TITHA CHAWIMAWINA AGRICULTURE MINISTER-IN HMANPUI
content:
1023/2026-2027

Dated : Mamit the 16th of June, 2026 :Vawiin khan Chhimveng YMA Hall, Mamit-ah Mamit MZP huaihawtin zirlai titha chawimawina neih a ni a, Pu Vanlalruata, Hon'ble Minister, Agriculture, I&WR, Co-operation chuan Khual Lian nia hun hmanpuiin zirlai tithate chawimawina a hlan.

Khual lian Pu Vanlalruata chuan hmanlai hunah chuan mi tlawmngai, hmingtha leh huaisen te'n chawimawina nopui an dawng thin a, tunah chuan zirna avanga mi hmingthate kan chawimawi ta a, Mamit khua leh tui atanga hetiang zat chawimawi tur an awm chu lawmawm a tih thu leh a lawmpui thu a sawi a. Tunlai khawvelah chuan kan zirna kalphungte a changkang tawh em em a, hei hi kan hman tangkai thiam a ngai a ni ti. Phone games leh social media hman dan chin tawk hriata, in thuhnun tir lovin keimahni zawkin kan thunun tur a ni a, ruihhlo leh a kaihhnawih laka fihlim, nu leh pa thuawih te'n malsawmna leh hlawhtlinna an chang thin a, chutiang mi ni tur chuan zirlai kalkhawmte a chah a ni.

Minister chuan zirna kailawn amah ngeiin a zawh chhoh danah retheihna, zirna bul tanna tha neilo chunga tun dinhmun hruai thlengtu chu Pathian, tawrhchhelhna leh a tum tlat vang a nih thu sawiin zirlai naupangte chu tumna a awm chuan kawng a awm a ni tih hre tlata, an zirlaiah chawimawi tlaka zirna chhunzawma hlawhtlinna duhawm tak chang vek turin duhsakna a hlan a, ram tana mi hmingtha tak takte'n mual an liam tawh a, nakin lawka kan ram leh hnam hruaitu tur kan nih avangin keimahni hun theuhah kan ram Mizoram tana hnutchhiah tha nei tura ngaihtuahna hmang tur leh ram tana mi chhenfakawm tak ni tura theihtawpchhuaha an zirlaite zir tur in a chah bawk.

He hunah hian khualzahawm Pu H. Zorempuia, Finance consultant, MAMCO, Ltd. Special Guest Pu Suvigya S. Chandra, DC Mamit, Khualtha Pu Emmanuela, Addl.DPC, Samagra Shiksha Mamit leh Uaptu Dr. C. Lalremruata, President MZP Gen. Hqrs te chuan hun hmanpuiin zirlaite fuihna thu an sawi a ni.

Vawiin-a zirlai titha chawimawite hi HSLC atangin 1st Div with Letters chin mi - 26, HSSLC atangin mi - 11, HSLC Top 10-a in hlangkai mi - 2, HSLC Subject topper mi 1 leh Institution Topper mi - 3 bakah MES tlingthar mi 1 te hnenah chawimawina hlan an ni.

He hun hi Pu Lalthansanga, President MZP, Mamit chuan kaihruaiin Pu Goerge Lalruatmawia, Secretary, MZP Mamit chuan report a pe.

Attachment

title: Chief Electoral Officer, Mizoram thuchhuak : Draft Roll tarchhuah ni siam danglam
content:
1022/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 16thJune, 2026:Election Commission of India chuan Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of Electoral Rolls thawh thumna neih mekah Mizoram tana hman tur schedule thar a ti chhuak. ECI schedule hmasaah chuan Draft Roll tihchhuah ni hiNi 05.07.2026 (Pathianni)a ni a,CEO Office, Mizoram in a ngen angin,Draft Roll tihchhuah ni atanNi 04.07.2026 (Inrinni)a ruat. Hemi rual hian Period of claims and objections pawh 05.07.2026 (Pathianni) - 04.08.2026 (Thawhlehni) atangin 04.07.2026 (Inrinni) - 04.08.2026 (Thawhlehni)- ah thlak niin, Notice Phase/Disposal of claims & objections pawh 05.07.2026 (Pathianni) - 02.09.2026 (Nilaini) atangin 04.07.2026 (Inrinni) - 02.09.2026 (Nilaini)-ah thlak a ni bawk.

Revised Schedule chu a hnuai ami ang hian a ni:

Activity

Timeline

Qualifying date of SIR

01.07.2026

Preparation, Training & Printing

20.05.2026 to 29.05.2026

House to House visits by BLOs

30.05.2026 to 28.06.2026

Rationalization of Polling Stations

By 28.06.2026

Publication of draft Electoral roll

04.07.2026 (Saturday)

Period for filing claims & objections

04.07.2026 to 04.08.2026

Notice Phase/ disposal of Claims & objection

04.07.2026 to 02.09.2026

Publication of Final Electoral Roll

06.09.2026 (Sunday)

Mizorama Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of Electoral Rolls, 2026 kalpui mekah tun dinhmunah Enumeration Form sem zawh thawkhat tawh niin, forms digitization-ah Mizoram hi SIR kalpui mek State dangte aiin a sang fal hie a, hma a hruai mek a ni.

Issued by Office of the Chief Electoral Officer, Mizoram

title: Lunglei West bialtu MLA Pu T. Lalhlimpuia'n Lungleiah kawṭhalo vanga naupang thihna a thlen loh nana ni 45 chhung beihpui thlak tur a hawng
content:
1021/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Nikir thla ni 16:Vawiin khan Lunglei District chhunga kawṭhalo (diarrhoea) vanga naupang thihna a thlen lohna tura, "Kawṭhalo ven nan faina leh ORS a pawimawh" tih thupui hmanga ni 45 (June 16 – July 31, 2026) chhung beihpui thlak, Stop Diarrhoea Campaign (SDC) kalpui tur chu Lunglei Chanmari Anganwadi Centre-II-ah Lunglei West bialtu MLA Pu T. Lalhlimpuia chuan a hawng.

Khuallian Pu T. Lalhlimpuia chuan naupangte hmakhua leh hriselna tura thil pawimawh tak mai, "STOP Diarrhoea Campaign 2026" kalpui a ni tur chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, Mizoram sawrkarin naupang hriselna a ngaih pawimawh thu leh naupang hrisel nana pawimawh tui thianghlim leh ei tur ṭha an hmuh theih nan theih tawpa hma a lak mek thu a sawi a. India ram pumah kumin thlenga naupang kum 5 hnuai lam sing nga (50,000) vel ngawtin kawṭhalo vanga nunna an la chan leh naupang thihna zawng zawngah kawṭhalovin 5.8% lai a la luah pha chu lungchhiatthlak a tih thu sawiin, hriselna chu ram dinhmun dik tak tar langtu a nih angin naupang hriselna atana theih tawp chhuah chhunzawm zel a ṭul thu a sawi.

Pu T. Lalhlimpuia chuan SDC kalpui chhungin Lunglei District chhunga naupang kum 5 hnuai lam target 10,868 hnenah kawṭhalo laka inven nan ORS packet 21,736 leh Zinc tablet 1,52,152 vel sem chhuah tum a nih thu sawiin, campaign hlawhtlin nan hriselna lama thawktu ASHA, Health Worker leh Anganwadi Worker te chu theih tawp chhuah tur leh nu leh pate pawhin ṭha taka lo thawhpui turin a chah a. Kawṭhalo vanga harsatna titlem turin sawrkar department hrang hrang, tlawmngai pawl leh mipui ṭan rual a pawimawh thu sawiin, mahni in leh a chhehvel vawn fai, thil ei hmaa kut sil fai ṭhat, kut sil dan dika kut sil leh tui thianghlim in tam bakah, kawṭhalo an awm a nih chuan ORS leh Zinc tablet pek vat ṭhin te a pawimawh thu a sawi.

He hun hi Lunglei District Senior Chief Medical Officer Dr Lalrinthangi'n kaihruaiin, SDC hman chhan a sawi fiah a. District Immunisation Officer (DIO) Dr Christina Zonunmawii chuan STOP Diarrhoea Campaign kalpui dan tur a sawi fiah a. Kawṭhalo chu naupang thihna thlentu tam ber pali zinga mi a nih thu sawiin, kawṭhalo chu ven theih a nih thu leh a venna hmanraw ṭha ber pakhat chu tui thianghlim in a nih thu te, kut sil fai ṭhat a pawimawh thu leh natna tam tak laka vengtu a nih thu te a sawi a. Rota Virus Vaccine (RVV) dose 3 lak hian nasa takin kawṭhalo vanga damlohna leh thihna a titlem tih sawiin, fate vaccine lak ngai pawimawh turin nu leh pate a chah a. Campaign chhunga naupang kum 5 hnuai lam kawṭhalo veite chu sub-centre emaw, ASHA te hnenah emaw report ṭhin turin nu leh pate a chah bawk.

Sub-Headquarters MHIP ai awh Pi Vanlalthangi Chhakchhuak chuan kut sil dan a taka entirin, naupangte a zirtir a. Naupangte hnenah kawṭhalo venna leh enkawlna tur ORS leh Zinc tablet sem niin, PHED Lunglei WATSAN Circle-a Superintending Engineer Er Lalsanga chuan lawm thu a sawi a. Hriselna leh tui thianghlim chu a inzawm tlat avangin PHED-in tui a sem tur chu uluk taka an thlit fim a, damdawi hmanga an tihthianghlim ṭhin thu sawiin, tun hnaiah Lunglei khawpui chhunga tuizem lian panga an enfiah thu leh a thianghlim ṭhat thu a sawi a. Sikul leh anganwadi centre ṭhenkhat tui dah khawl an endik (test)-ah hlauhawm tham ni lo mah se, bacteria an hmuh thu leh PHED tui sem chu thianghlim mah se, mahni tuizema bawlhhlawh lut thei laka fimkhur a ṭul thu te, a bikin sikul, anganwadi centre leh damdawi inte chuan an tuizema tuite chu a khat tawka PHED Laboratory Ramzotlanga endiktir leh a tihthianghlimna tur chlorine te dil ṭhin a ṭhat thu a sawi.

STOP Diarrhoea Campaign hi kawṭhalo vanga naupang kum 5 hnuai lam thihna a thlen lohna tura beihpui thlakna niin, kawṭhalo ven beihpui thlak chhung hian anganwadi centre, sikul leh damdawi in hrang hrangahte ORS & Zinc Corner siama damdawi (ORS & Zinc) sem hi kalpui a nih dawn bakah, kawṭhalo ven dan leh enkawl dan te, tui thianghlim in leh hman pawimawhna te, kut sil fai pawimawhna leh kut sil fai dan te, faina leh thianghlimna chungchanga naupangte leh anmahni enkawltute tana hriat tur pawimawh hrang hrang inzirtirna te buatsaih a ni ang.

Nikum 2025-a SDC kalpui chhung khan Lunglei health district (Lunglei District leh Hnahthial District inkawp) chhungah kawṭhalo ven/enkawl nan ORS leh Zinc tablet pek tur naupang kum 5 hnuai lam 13,684 tinzawn niin, mi 13,118 (95.9%) hnenah pek a ni a. Kumina SDC kalpui chhung hian Lunglei District bikah naupang kum 5 hnuai lam 10,868 tinzawn niin, ORS bawm (packet) 2 zel leh Zinc tablet mum 14 zel pek tura ruahman a ni.

Attachment

title: SAITUALAH STOP DIARRHOEA CAMPAIGN 2026 HAWNNA HUN HMANG
content:
1020/2026-2027

Saitual, the 16th June, 2025: Vawiin khan Aganwadi Centre VII, Saitualah, India ram pum huapa naupangte zinga kawthalo (diarrhoea) vanga thihna pumpelhna tura beihpui thlakna “Stop Diarrhoea Campaign 2026” hawnna hun hman a ni a, Saitual Bawrhsap Pu Srinivas Sadi chu khuallian niin he campaign hi a hawng nghal a ni.

He hunah hian Dr. Zothanpari Chhakchhuak, Dy. CMO chuan ORS pawimawhna te tarlangin, mi tam tak kawthalo vanga an thih chhan chu taksaa tui leh electrolytes tlak chham (dehydration) vang a ni, a ti a, dehydration lan chhuah dan te a sawi bawk. Dy. CMO chuan naupang an kum a zira zinc pek dan tur te a tarlang a, kalkhawmte chu kut fai taka sil dan te a zirtir bawk a ni.

Kumin STOP Diarrhoea Campaign thupui chu “ORS leh faina leh thianghlimna hmangin kawthalo lakah inveng rawh”- “Prevent Diarrhoea-Take care with Hygiene and ORS” tih a ni. June ni 16 atanga July ni 31, 2026  thleng kalpui tur niin, he campaign chhung hian naupang kum 5 hnuai lamte hnenah a thlawnin ORS leh Zinc tablet te sem a ni dawn a ni. ASHA leh healthworker te chu hmun hrang hrangah kalin kawthalo ven dan leh enkawl dan te, kut sil dan te, ORS leh zinc pawimawhna te, faina chungchang zirtirna te an pe ang. Sub centre-ah te leh Anganwadi Centre-ah te ORS-Zinc corner siam a ni ang a, heng hmunah te hian naupang kawthalote chuan enkawlna an dawng thei dawn a ni.

Saitual District-a Stop Diarrhoea Campaign 2026 hawnna hun hi Dr. H Lalsangliana, MO Ayush chuan a kai hruai a, Dr. Zothanpari Chhakchhuak, Dy. CMO in thu a sawi bawk a ni. He hunah hian Aganwadi VII naupangte hnenah ORS leh Zinc sem niin, kut sil dan tur dik tak inzirtirna hun hman a ni bawk.

Attachment

title: SOCIAL WELFARE MINISTER-IN PROJECT THAICHHAWNINU A TLANGZARH
content:
1019/2026-2027Dated Aizawl: the 16 June 2026 :Vawiin khan Social Welfare, Women & Child Development Department changtu Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan Booth Mansion Conference Hall, Salvation Army Territorial Headquarter, Aizawl-ah, Beti Bachao Beti Padhao flagship hnuaiah Mizoram Postal Division leh Women & Child Development Department tangkawp hmalakna, hmeichhe naupang hmakhua ngaihtuahna, 'Project Thaichhawninu' chu khuallian niin a tlangzarh.

He hunah hian Pi Lalrinpuii, Social Welfare, Women & Child Development Department changtu Minister chuan thusawiin, Hmeichhe naupangte hamthatna leh Nu leh Pate mawhphurhna pawimawh tak tilang thei Project Thaichhawninu tlangzarh a ni ta chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Minister chuan, fanute chu ram leh hnam innghahna an ni tih sawiin, An hmakhua chu Mizoram hmakhua a nih avangin chumi ngaihtuah chu Nu leh Pate mawhphurhna pawimawh ber pakhat a ni a ti a. A fanu Mauruangi damkhawchhuah nana a nuin theitawp a chhuah angin,fa ten hmakhaw eng tak an neih theih nana kaihhruai leh venhim chu Nu leh Pa tinte ko va tla a ni tih a sawi a. Nu leh pa, pi leh pu bakah nau piang thar nei zawng zawng chu kum 10 la tling lo hmeichhe naupangte tan SSY account chu hawnsak theuh tura chahin, chumi kawngah chuan Kohhran, Tlawmngaipawl, Anganwadi Worker, ASHA, Zirtirtute leh Postal Department-a thawktute chu tanrualpuiah Minister chuan a sawm nghal bawk a ni.

Project hming ‘Thaichhawninu’ hi Mizo thawnthu hlun tak pakhat Mauruangi leh Bingtaitukite thawhnthu atanga lak a ni a. Mauruangi nu-in rethei tak chung pawha a fanu tan thaichhawn-a a inpek ang khan, tunlai nu leh pa ten Sukanya Samriddhi Account hmang hian an fanute hmakhua atan an inpek ve theih nan he project hi duan a ni.

project Thaichhawninu hi Mizoram District 11 chhunga RD Block 27, ICDS huam chhung khaw hrang hrangahte kalpui tura ruahman a ni a. Project hnuaiah hian hmeichhe naupangte chu Post Office leh State Bank of India kaltlangin account hawnsak theih an ni ang a. Anganwadi Worker leh Postal Department a thawktute chuan khaw tinah awareness leh account hawn runpui hi an nei dawn a. Ruahman ang chuan Thla 10 chhungin kum 10 hnuai lam hmeichhe naupang 4050 ziah luh hman tum a ni a. Tunah hian Mizoram-ah hmeichhe naupang 18,560-in SSY account hi an nei tawhin, kum 10 hnuai lam projected population nuai 1 leh sing 5 chuangatanga chhut chuan tan lak a la ngai hle a ni.

Vawiina Project tlangzarh inkhawm hi Pi Lalzarmawii, Commissioner&Secretary, SW, WC&D chuan a kaihruai a. KI Singh, Superintendent of Post, Mizoram Division-in Project Thaichhawninu chungchang a sawizau a. Pi Zoramthangi Chhangte, Director WCD chuan lawmthu sawiin tlangzarh inkhawm hi a titawp a ni.

Attachment

title: PHE Minister Prof.Lalnilawma’n PHE Department a Mizoram Engineer Service (MES) tling tharte thingpui a in pui
content:
1018/2026-2027

16th June, 2026:Vawiin khan PHE Minister Prof. Lalnilawma chuan kum 2026 a MPSC buatsaih Mizoram Engineer Service (MES) exam-a tling thar mi pasarih (7), PHE Department a thawkte lawmpuina leh infuihtharna neih pahin a pisaah thingpui a in pui.

Minister chuan Engineer te hi Department mai bakah Mizoram hmasawnna lungphum an ni, a ti a. MES officer thar te chu mipui ta an ni a, an hnathawh leh hmalakna apiang mipui leh ram hmansawnna atan ni zel rawh se, tiin a fuih.

Officer thar te chu mi dangte tanpui duhna thinlung pu turin Prof Lalnilawma chuan a chah a. Mipuiin an mamawhnaah chuan theihtawp an chhuah a, a tul anga mipui tanpui thei tura kawng an zawn zel a ngai a ni, a ti. Sawrkar kutke an nih avangin rinawm leh taima takin hna an thawh a tul a, khawi hmunah pawh awm se, an awmna hmun apiangah theihtawp chhuah turin a Minister chuan a fuih a nj. Transfer and posting ah buai lo tura chahin hmun harsa leh kilkhawr ah pawh awm se, achievement tha tak neih tum turin a chah a. Sawrkar in a dahna apiang ah phur taka kal zel a pawimawh a, khawi hmunah pawh awm thei tur leh rinawm taka hnathawk thei turin an rilru siam se a duh thu PHE Minister Prof Lalnilawma chuan a sawi a ni.

He hunah hian Pi Zodingpuii, IAS, Secretary, PHED; Er.Zodinthari, Engineer In Chief, PHED leh PHE Department-a senior officer te an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: AMC MAYOR-IN ‘STOP DIARRHOEA CAMPAIGN 2026’ HAWNG
content:
1017/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 16th June 2026:Vawiin khan AMC Mayor Pu H. Lalremtluanga chuan Edenthar BSUP, Aizawla ‘Stop Diarrhoea Campaign 2026’ hawnna inkhawm chu khuallian niin a hmanpui.

Pu H. Lalremtluanga chuan he campaign a hmanpui thei chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a, kawthalo laka invenhim a pawimawhzia sawiin kawthaloin nunna a suat thin chu umbo theih a ni a, heng atan hian inzirtirna kalpui zel a pawimawh, a ti a. PHE department te, Health department te leh AMC te chuan mipuite hriselna leh faina turin ke an pen zel thin thu a sawi a. Kawthalo hi natna tlanglawn tak ni mah se kum 2025 chhungin India ram pumah naupang nuai 1.2 laiin an thihpui chu pawi a ti a, ORS leh zinc damdawi hmanga inenkawl a pawimawhzia sawiin National Health Mission hnuaia sawrkar Sub-centre leh ASHA (Accredited Social Health Activists) thawktute atang zinc tablets leh ORS chu a thlawnin lak theih reng a ni, a ti a. Mayor chuan AMC-in PSUB-a chengte chu a ngaipawimawh a, hma an sawn zel nan hmalak a inhuam tlat thu leh thawhhona tha tak an neih theih a beisei thu a sawi bawk.

He programme-ah hian ‘Kawthalo ven nan faina leh ORS a pawimawh’ tih thupui atan hman niin, National Health Mission (NHM) hnuaia Aizawl East District Chief Medical Officer (CMO) office huaihawt a ni. ‘Stop Diarrhoea Campaign 2026’ hi hriselna lama mipui zirtirna campaign Ministry of Health and Family Welfare huaihawt niin, naute leh naupang kawthalo vanga an thihna thleng thin chu tihtawp a nih theihna tura an hmalakna a ni. He campaign hi ram pum huap campaign niin June ni 16 atanga July ni 31, 2026 thleng hman a ni dawn a ni.

Vawiin launch campaign hi Aizawl East District Sr. CMO Dr. Lalhlunpuii chu chairperson niin a kaihruai a, Dr Lucy Lalsangpuii chuan ‘Stop Diarrhoea Campaign 2026’ chungchanga inzirtirna chu presentation hmangin a sawifiah a. Pi Lalnuntluangi, District Programme Manager, NHM, CMO East chuan lawmthu sawinain he hun a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: Stop Diarrhoea Campaign 2026 Hnahthial District hawnna hun hman a ni
content:
1016/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial the 16th June, 2026:Vawiin khan Government Model Middle School-ah June 16 atanga July 31 thleng awh tur "Stop Diarrhoea Campaign 2026" hawnna chu neih niin Pu Zothanmawia Khiangte, Additional DC chuan khuallian niin a hawng a. Pi K. Zoramchhani, District Education Officer (DEO) chuan he hun hi kaihruaiin, Dr. Zosangliani, Medical Superintendent leh Pi RTC. Lalchhanhimi, Health & Wellness Officer te chuan thusawina hun an hmang bawk a ni.

Pu Zothanmawia Khiangte Addl. DC chuan naupangt e chu tui in tam tur leh faina kawnga tan la lehzual turin a fuih a. Nizan lawka veng fai inelna lawmman an sem zawh tak chungchang pawh sawiin, inelna chu zo tawh mah se mahni veng theuh fai taka enkawl chhunzawm chu mitin mawhphurhna a nih thu leh hemi kawnga theihtawp chhuah zel turin kalkhawmte a chah a ni.

Dr. Zosangliani, Medical Superintendent chuan India ramah kawthalo natna a tam thu leh thihpui an tam avanga he Campaign hi buaitsaih a nih thu a sawi a. Kawthalo chu khawvel pumpuaiah Naupang kum 5 hnuai lam thihna thlentu tam ber zinga pathumna a nih mek thu sawiin naupiang 1000 ah mi 26 zel chu kawthalo vanga thi an nih thu a tarlang bawk. Medical Superintendent hian kawthalo laka inven dan leh a kaichhawn theih dan te a sawi bakah he natna vei te tan ORS leh tui intam a pawimawh thu a sawi a ni.

Pi Dr. RTC. Lalchhanhimi Health & Wellness Officer, chuan kal khawmte chu kut sil dan inzirtirna Live Demonstration a neih pui bawk.

Campaign hawnna ah hian Government Model Middle School naupang leh zirtirtu te, MJA Hnahthial member te leh Health Department lama thawktute an te a ni.

Attachment

title: SERCHHIP DC IN VB-GRAM G ORIENTATION TRAINING A HAWNG
content:
1015/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 16thJune 2026:Vawiin khan DRDO Serchhip huaihawtin Serchhip District chhunga Vikshit Bharat Grameen Rozgar Ajeevika Mission Guarantee: VB-G RAM G training chu Serchhip BDO Conference Hall-ah buatsaih a ni a, Serchhip District Bawrhsap Pu Paul L Khuma’n khuallian niin a hawng.

Bawrhsap Pu Paul L Khuma chuan thawktute chu tha thlah lo tura fuihin "VBGRAMG programme chu a ruangam a ni a, a tuam mawitu, a hlawhtlintirtu chu thawktute kan ni" tiin "Mipui kan ti beidawng tur a ni lo" a ti a. "Mizoram chu India rama VBGRAMG Notify hmasa ber state kan ni a, hei hi Serchhip District pawhin kan chhu zui anga, state puma hmahruaitu district ni turin ṭan ka la tur a ni" tiin kal khawmte chu a chah a ni.

Dr. Malsawmtluanga Fanchun, Project Director, DRDO pawhin thusawiin 'Ni za inhlawhna' tia sawi ṭhin MGNREGA chu sawrkar laipui chuan a hming leh a kalphung thlakin VB-G RAM G tih a ni tawh dawn tih a sawi a. Thil thar diai chu a ni lo nain, eng eng emaw tihdanglam a awm nual avangin, uluk taka zir a tul a. A hma aia tha zawka kan kalpui theih nan bul kan tan that hi a tul hle a, theihtawp kan chhuah a tul a ni, a ti a. Hun hlawk thlak tak an hman theih nan duhsakna a hlan a ni.

He hun hi Pu Stephen Laltlansanga Auhmun, ARDO Serchhip chuan a kaihruai a. Dr. Marilyn Lalruatkimi, BDO E. Lungdar, Dr. Lalramdintluanga, BDO Serchhip te bakah District chhunga RD Block pahnih - East Lungdar leh Serchhip RD Block a MGNREGA Staff te leh DRDO mi leh sate an tel a ni.

Vawiina training-ah hian thupui hrang hrang - 'VB G RAM G kalphung' tih te, 'Solid Waste Management Act 2026' tih te, 'Scheme hnuaia hna thawh phal chin' tihte inzirtir a ni.

title: CHIEF MINISTER HOVIN PLANNING LEH FINANCE HOTUTE THUKHAWM
content:
1014/2026-2027

Aizawl the 16th June 2026:Vawiin khan Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma hovin a office-ah Planning & Programme Implementation Department leh Finance Department hotute an thukhawm a, Ministry of Finance-in hmarchhak huapa Institutional Capacity in North Eastern Region Workshop, Shillong-a neih tur inbuatsaihna an nei a. SASCI hnathawh mek leh hmachhawpte an thlirho bawk. Meeting-ah hian Pu TBC Lalvenchhunga, Adviser to CM pawh a tel a ni.

Ministry of Finance, Government of India chuan India hmarchhak biala Externally Aided Project kalpui chungchangah awmze nei zawka kalpui a nih theih dan tur zirhona - Strengthening Institutional Capacity a buatsaih dawn a. Hmarchhak biala EAP Institution leh Technical Capacity tihchak dan tur te, state hrang hrangten EAP an kalpuina lama an tawnhriat inhrilhtawnna te leh Ministry hrang hrangte tha zawka an thawhho dan tur te an zirho dawn a ni. He workshop-ah hian hmarchhak biala Chief Minister zawng zawngte chu tel tura beisei an ni a. Mizoram Chief Minister pawhin thusawina hun a nei ang.

Workshop atana inbuatsaihnate an sawiho hnuah SASCI 2025-26 hna kal mek leh SASCI 2026-27 a hmalakna thar turte sawihona an nei leh a ni.

Attachment

title: IPRP&S MINISTER PU B. LALCHHANZOVA'N ZUCHHIP BRANCH YMA DAY VAWI 91-NA A HMANPUI
content:
1013/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 16th June 2026 :Nizan khan Information, Public Relations, Printing & Stationery (IPRP&S) Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova'n YMA Zuchhip Branch, Khawzawl YMA Day vawi 91-na chu Zuchhip Branch YMA Hall-ah khuallian niin a hmanpui.

YMA Day lawmnaah hian khuallian Pu B. Lalchhanzova chuan thusawiin Zuchhip Branch YMA Day lawmnaa a tel thei chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Ruihhlo avanga thalai mual liam tawh tam tak an awm chu pawi a tih thu sawiin thalai kalkhawmte chu ruihhlo laka fihlim a, an thian kawmte pawh thlang fimkhur a, an nun uluk taka hmang a, kum 70 piancham tal lawm thlen tum turin a sawm a. Zuchhip naupang leh thalaite chu finna leh theihna tha tak an neih thu sawiin, khawtlang leh ram hmasawn nan lehkha zir kawngah nasa taka tan la thar turin a fuih bawk.

YMA Day lawmna inkhawm hi Branch YMA President Pu Robert Lalthlamuana’n a kaihruai a, Sub-Headquarters YMA President Pu PC Rosiama’n kumpuan thupui ‘ruihhlo do’ a sawi a. Branch Secretary hnen atangin report ngaihthlak a ni a, YMA thuthlung sawi rualna neih a nih bakah item hrang hrang ngaihthlak leh thlirho a ni.  YMA Day puala inelna an buatsaih hrang hrang result puan leh lawmman semna neih a ni bawk.
